key_points: Democracy improves the quality of decision making through public discussion
Democratic governments gain legitimacy through free and fair elections
Economic inequality can still exist even in democratic societies
Democracy helps manage social diversity peacefully
Democracy promotes dignity, equality and freedom among citizens
examples: Public debate in parliament before passing laws
concepts: Legitimacy arises from public acceptance of government authority
Accountability ensures leaders remain answerable to citizens
Accommodation of social diversity helps maintain national unity
Freedom of expression allows citizens to criticize government actions
exam_tips: Link democratic outcomes with real-life examples
Use key terms like legitimacy, accountability, and social diversity
Compare democracy with other forms of government when explaining advantages
